tools.Name: Scientific Agent Skills
tools.Description: A collection of 135+ ready-to-use scientific skills for AI agents, covering genomics, drug discovery, and clinical research.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex multi-step scientific workflows like virtual drug screening or single-cell RNA-seq analysis.

tools.Name: PraisonAI
tools.Description: An orchestration framework for hiring and deploying 24/7 autonomous AI workforces with built-in memory and RAG.
tools.Use_Case: Deploying self-improving teams of agents to perform research, coding, and workflow automation in 5 lines of code.

tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth Chromium binary that bypasses bot detection at the C++ source level, serving as a drop-in Playwright/Puppeteer replacement.
tools.Use_Case: Automating web interactions on highly protected sites (e.g., Cloudflare Turnstile, reCAPTCHA v3) without getting blocked.
